zh.lifeSummary: 當John Thomas Tucker於1626年9月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州時，他的父親Capt. William Tucker38歲，母親Mary Thompson28歲。他於1645年10月26日與Mary Allerton在美國維吉尼亞州阿爾貝馬爾威斯特摩蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1647年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可諾福爾可被列為clerk of norfolk county court。他去世於1671年5月5日在美國維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭享年44歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Thomas Tucker于1626年9月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州时，他的父亲Capt. William Tucker38岁，母亲Mary Thompson28岁。他于1645年10月26日与Mary Allerton在美国弗吉尼亚州阿爾貝馬爾威斯特摩蘭结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1647年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可諾福爾可被列为clerk of norfolk county court。他去世于1671年5月5日在美国弗吉尼亚州威斯特摩蘭享年44岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州威斯特摩蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Tucker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’, a derivative of tuken ‘to torment, beat’ (Old English tūcian), for someone who fulled and finished cloth. This name for the occupation was characteristic of the West Country. Compare Fuller and Walker and see also Tuckerman .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tuachair ‘descendant of Tuachar’, a personal name composed of the elements tuath ‘people’ + car ‘dear, beloved’.
Americanized form of Jewish Tocker or Toker (see Tokarz ).

variants.name: Tooker
meanings: English (Devon) and Irish: variant of   Tucker  .

variants.name: Tuckerman
meanings: English: from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’ (see Tucker 1) + -man, either for a tucker, or for his servant or assistant.

variants.name: Fuller
meanings: English: occupational name for a dresser of cloth, from Middle English fuller ‘fuller of cloth’ (partly from Old English fullere, partly from Old French fouleor, foleur, Latin fullo). Raw cloth had to be fulled, i.e. scoured, cleansed, and thickened by beating or trampling it in water, a process also known as walking or tucking, hence the surnames Walker and Tucker alongside Fuller. These three terms and surnames are characteristic of different parts of England. In general, in Middle English, Fuller is southern and eastern, while Walker belongs to the west and north and Tucker is southwestern. Compare Fullen .
English: variant of Fullard with loss of -d.
German (Füller): occupational name for a person whose work involved filling, such as a dauber, or a nickname for a gourmand or glutton. Compare Filler .

variants.name: Swinger
meanings: English: occupational name, perhaps for a fuller, who finished cloth by beating it and stretching it on tenters. Middle English swyngere is not independently recorded but it appears to be an agent derivative of Middle English swingen ‘to beat, strike, punish, afflict (something)’. Compare the synonymous Tucker , an agent derivative of Middle English tuken ‘to torment, beat’. The earliest bearers of the name Swinger were wealthy townsmen.
In some instances probably an Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schwinger , or German Zwinger, a nickname from Middle High German zwinger ‘oppressor’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When John Thomas Tucker was born on 8 September 1626, in Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Capt. William Tucker, was 38 and his mother, Mary Thompson, was 28. He married Mary Allerton on 26 October 1645, in Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1647, his occupation is listed as clerk of norfolk county court in Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. He died on 5 May 1671, in Westmoreland, Virginia, United States, at the age of 44, and was buried in Westmoreland, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Thomas Tucker est né le 8 septembre 1626, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Capt. William Tucker, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mary Thompson, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary Allerton le 26 octobre 1645, à Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1647, sa profession de son indiquée est clerk of norfolk county court à Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 5 mai 1671, à Westmoreland, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Westmoreland, Virginie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Thomas Tucker am 8. September 1626 in Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Capt. William Tucker 38 und seine Mutter Mary Thompson 28. Er hat am 26. Oktober 1645 in Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Allerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1647 ist sein Beruf als clerk of norfolk county court in Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. Mai 1671 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Westmoreland, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Westmoreland, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Thomas Tucker è nato il il 8 settembre 1626 nel Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Capt. William Tucker, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Mary Thompson, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mary Allerton il 26 ottobre 1645, nel Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1647, la sua occupazione è indicata come clerk of norfolk county court nel Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Morì il 5 maggio 1671, nel Westmoreland, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Westmoreland, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Thomas Tuckerが1626年9月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州で生まれた時，父Capt. William Tuckerは38歳，母Mary Thompsonは28歳であった。1645年10月26日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州アルベマルルウエストモーエランドでMary Allertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1647年，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノーフォルクノーフォルクでの職業はclerk of norfolk county courtと記録されている。彼は1671年5月5日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ウエストモーエランドで44歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州ウエストモーエランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 엘리자베스 시티
ko.lifeSummary: John Thomas Tucker(이)가 1626년 9월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Capt. William Tucker(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Thompson(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1645년 10월 26일 미국 버지니아 주 알브마일 웨스트모렐랜드에서 Mary Allerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1647년, 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크 노르폴크에서 clerk of norfolk county court이었다. 그는 1671년 5월 5일 미국 버지니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Thomas Tucker nasceu em 8 de setembro de 1626, em Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Capt. William Tucker, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary Thompson, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Allerton em 26 de outubro de 1645, em Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1647, sua profissão aparece como clerk of norfolk county court em Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 5 de maio de 1671, em Westmoreland, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Westmoreland, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Thomas Tucker родился 8 сентября 1626 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Capt. William Tucker было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Thompson, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Allerton 26 октября 1645 г. в местности вестмореланд, альбемарл, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1647 году он работал по профессии clerk of norfolk county court в местности норфолк, норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 5 мая 1671 г. в местности вестмореланд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности вестмореланд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Thomas Tucker nació el 8 de septiembre de 1626, en Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Capt. William Tucker, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mary Thompson, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mary Allerton el 26 de octubre de 1645, en Westmoreland, Albemarle, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1647, su ocupación registrada era clerk of norfolk county court en Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1671, en Westmoreland, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Westmoreland, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
